name: runtime-config-monorepo
description: Framework-agnostic runtime config — inspired by Nuxt 3/4 useRuntimeConfig

scripts.pub: bun run build && bun publish --cwd packages/core && bun publish --cwd packages/vite && bun publish --cwd packages/react
scripts.pub:dry: bun run build && bun publish --cwd packages/core --dry-run && bun publish --cwd packages/vite --dry-run && bun publish --cwd packages/react --dry-run
